title: Make The Computer Yours
ticket: Sarah says the screen is hard to read and wants the computer adjusted.
clue: Small display changes can solve big usability pain.
tooltip: Use personalization and accessibility settings safely.
whyItMatters: Readable setups reduce mistakes and fatigue.
careerConnection: IT support improves user productivity through profile tuning.

actionTask.instructions: Adjust text size and theme, then verify readability with the user.
actionTask.expectedResult: The display feels clearer and easier to use.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Personalization and accessibility settings open side by side.

repeatTask: Repeat with another safe personalization setting.
breakFixTask: Set unreadable scaling, then restore a comfortable value.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Sarah now has a comfortable and readable setup.

translationTerms.plain: Settings that make computers easier to use.
